zh.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossard是Nigel Fossard和wife Nigel Fossard的女兒，於1138年出生在英國越可爾素斯 奧特林頓。她於大約1155年與Robert de Meinell在英國越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年在英國越可爾爾頓享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossard是Nigel Fossard和wife Nigel Fossard的女儿，于1138年出生在英国越可爾素斯 奧特林頓。她于大约1155年与Robert de Meinell在英国越可爾爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年在英国越可爾爾頓享年62岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Fozard
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from the Old French personal name Fossard.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossard was born in 1138, in South Otterington, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Nigel Fossard and wife Nigel Fossard. She married Robert de Meinell about 1155, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1200, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62.

Elle a épousé Robert de Meinell environ 1155, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1200, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossardは1138年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソウス オッテリントンでNigel Fossardとwife Nigel Fossardの娘として生まれた。約1155年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでRobert de Meinellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossard(은)는 1138년 영국 요르크실르 소우스 오테링턴에서 Nigel Fossard(와)과 wife Nigel Fossard의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1155년 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Robert de Meinell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert de Meinell aproximadamente 1155, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1200, em Whorlton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gertrude Asceline Fossard родилась в 1138 г. в местности соут оттирингтон, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Nigel Fossard и wife Nigel Fossard. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Meinell около 1155 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1200 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
